claimRefund(uint256).notice: Refund buyer if deal expired (seller never accepted/delivered)         or if dispute timeout reached without resolution.

confirmDelivery(uint256).notice: Buyer confirms delivery, releasing escrowed funds to seller.

createDeal(uint256,uint256,uint256,addre.notice: Create a deal and escrow payment.         Buyer must own the buyerAgentId NFT and approve token transfer.

deliverDeal(uint256,string).notice: Seller marks deal as delivered with proof.
